[ Project ]

Computer Science Notes

A static technical hub that turns Notion notes, blog essays, search, RSS, and portfolio pages into Cloudflare Pages artifacts.

static-sitenotionsearchcloudflare-pages
Code Write-up

/ Case study

Problem, method, result, code, write-up, and status.

Problem

Technical notes are useful only if readers can navigate, search, share, and trust their formatting. The project turns a personal study corpus into a durable public knowledge system.

Method

Build-time Notion ingestion normalizes topic trees into static routes. A site-styling boundary renders the shell, RSS, sitemap, metadata, and search without runtime services.

Result

The site publishes topic hierarchies, child pages, blog posts, RSS, sitemap, MathJax-backed LaTeX, code blocks, and deterministic build checks.

Status

active flagship

/ Contact

Contact me about research, internships, consulting, or NUS AI Society collaboration.

Useful messages usually start from a specific overlap: a paper, project, team, startup problem, internship role, workshop, sponsor idea, or AI Society collaboration.

Calendly is intentionally omitted until availability can be honored reliably.

Email me Contact page Collaborate

/ Discovery
